ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the team is participating in */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium the team plays in */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., defender, forward, goalkeeper, midfielder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in this position */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in this position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foot_preferences" (
  "foot_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foot preference */,
  "foot_preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the foot preference (e.g., left, right) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the foot preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foot_preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_foot_preferences" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "foot_preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the foot preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "foot_preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match is part of */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_players" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in this match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in this match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in this match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in this match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in this match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card, red card) */,
  "event_time" INTEGER /* Time of the event in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach-player relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach-player relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that plays in this stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stadiums" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards in the match */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners in the match */,
  "free_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Transfer fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadium_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadium_facilities_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)
